name: Informational Completeness Duality splitting d=12 into Quantum Measurement and Classical Outcome

phase_0.domain_name: Informational Completeness Duality splitting d=12 into Quantum Measurement and Classical Outcome
phase_0.boundary_condition: TANCH encapsulates the complete SIC-POVM lattice with Frobenius closure preventing logical explosion

VINIT.justification: The void state before any primitive assignment or measurement occurs

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary containing all 144 SIC elements and their algebraic relationships

AFWD.justification: The directed transformation from initial state to measured quantum state via SIC elements

AREV.justification: The reverse process of extracting classical probabilities from quantum amplitudes

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of all 12 primitive measurements into a complete structural type

IMSCRIB.justification: The Zauner fiducial vector that generates the entire SIC-POVM through its own displacement structure

FSPLIT.justification: Splits d=12 dimensional space into quantum measurement space (C^12) and classical outcome space (Crystal)

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the complete measurement system from quantum and classical components

EVALT.justification: The bijection between quantum state and classical probability distribution holds

EVALF.justification: Failure state where measurement does not achieve informational completeness

ENGAGR.justification: The ⊙ primitive simultaneously both absorbs contradictions and maintains coherence

IFIX.justification: Irreversible fixing of a crystal type as a permanent record of the measurement

phase_2.fuse_result: Complete SIC-POVM measurement system with informational completeness

phase_3.void_description: Uninitialized state before any primitive assignment
phase_3.true_description: Quantum state successfully reconstructed from SIC measurements
phase_3.false_description: Measurement failed to achieve informational completeness
phase_3.both_description: Criticality primitive ⊙ maintains paraconsistent state holding both quantum and classical aspects

steps.domain_action: Genesis of the 12-dimensional primitive space before any measurement occurs

Fusion of quantum and classical components back into complete measurement system
Paraconsistent criticality maintaining both quantum and classical aspects simultaneously
Secondary split into Weyl-Heisenberg group structure vs. primitive value assignments
Generating displacement operators from the fiducial vector
Confirming all 144 SIC elements satisfy equiangularity condition
Composition of all 144 displacement operations into complete POVM
Identity recognition of the self-measuring nature of the system
Reconstitution of complete measurement apparatus from component structures
Split into temporal ordering of measurements vs. static outcome space
Recovery of density matrix from measured probabilities
Alternative path exploring information loss scenarios
Irreversible recording of specific crystal type as measurement outcome
Final composition linking all measurement results into single structural assignment
Paraconsistent closure where quantum superposition and classical definiteness coexist
Final fusion restoring holistic measurement system from quantum-classical duality
Terminal anchoring of completed SIC-POVM measurement process

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Weyl-Heisenberg group generators translate primitive assignments into displacement operators
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Communication between quantum and classical components via probability amplitudes
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Crystal of Types stores all valid joint primitive assignments as permanent records
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Zauner symmetry determines the temporal ordering of displacement operations
phase_5.alfs_store: Imscribing Grammar catalog contains all primitive relationships and their algebraic compositions

phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unknown quantum state in C^12 requiring complete tomography
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Reconstructed density matrix from 144 SIC probability measurements
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — Informational completeness ensures zero reconstruction entropy

      -- F-branch (5 nodes)

        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [17] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Recovery of density matrix from measured probabilities)
